user.title: Cleanliness Tracker
user.description: Per-room cleanliness scoring based on presence sensors. After setup, use 'Configure' to add as many rooms as you like.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this integration instance (e.g. 'Ground floor').

abort.already_configured: An integration with this name already exists.

user.title: Add room
user.description: Pairs an area with a presence entity and defines when the room is considered 'due'.

data_description.area_id: The HA area this room belongs to.
data_description.presence_entity_id: A binary_sensor with motion / presence / occupancy. Recommended device_class: motion or occupancy.
data_description.threshold: Score at which binary_sensor.cleanliness_ROOM_due turns on (default 80).
data_description.weight_per_minute: Score points accrued per minute of active presence (default 0.5).

reconfigure.title: Edit room
reconfigure.description: Changes take effect immediately; the existing score and last-cleaned timestamp are preserved.

error.area_duplicate: A room for this area already exists.
